active_constraints.constraint: Reversed-Z projection for infinite far plane.
Double precision ECEF-to-ENU subtraction and rotation.

key_knowledge.knowledge: Standard GLTF 2.0 does not support double precision positions; reading floats into doubles for subtraction is the primary mitigation.
Normal rotation in ECEF space requires re-normalization for shading consistency.
Headless capture requires explicit framing triggers in sketch.cpp.
